case_title: YING LI VS. DAVID FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ORIGINAL LEASE BY BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2011 SAN JOSE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING SERVED MAR-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING SERVED MAR-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DAVID
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, YING
